Performed computations instead of restricting to data gathering
Provided final answers/explanations instead of only issuing tool calls
Used the wrong tool for the phase (calculator/unit_converter instead of knowledge_lookup)
Failed to use knowledge_lookup as required or omitted necessary calls
Queried invalid or unsupported topics/parameters (e.g., non-allowed topic names)
Incomplete coverage of required entities/facts (missed cities/countries/constants)
Redundant or duplicate lookups for the same topic (violated one-call-per-topic rule)
Produced narrative summaries instead of bare tool invocations/results
Performed unit conversions with disallowed tools or invalid/mismatched units
Did not stop after sufficient facts were fetched; proceeded to compute unnecessarily
Topic naming/format issues (case sensitivity, capitalization mismatches)
Did not gather needed conversion facts upfront when conversions are part of data collection
